name: sick-fits
description: Sick Fits — full-stack e-commerce demo (Next.js + Apollo Client + Apollo Server + Prisma + PostgreSQL)

scripts.dev: docker compose up -d db && npx wait-on tcp:5432 && npm run db:setup && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=backend" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend"
scripts.db:setup: npm run migrate --workspace=backend && npm run seed --workspace=backend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run start --workspace=backend" "npm run start --workspace=frontend"
